name: FGA Canonical
description: Flying Goat Agency's own brand kit, packaged as named-token CSS variables. Used as fallback when no reference style is supplied. Source: reference_fga_brand_kit vault memory.

--color-jet-anchor.role: Primary dark surface — page backgrounds, footer, hero overlays

--color-paper-base.role: Primary light surface — section backgrounds, card fills

--color-electric-canary.role: Signature brand accent — CTAs, badges, key highlights ONLY
--color-electric-canary.context: high-energy yellow, sparingly used to retain power

--color-blaze-alt.role: Alternate accent for emergency/urgency framings — never paired with electric-canary in same section

--color-shadow-surface.role: Section backgrounds on dark mode, card fills on dark surfaces

--font-display-anton.role: Display headlines — hero, section eyebrows, wordmarks

antiPatterns: Never use --color-electric-canary for large surface fills — it becomes oppressive past ~30% of viewport
Never use --color-blaze-alt and --color-electric-canary in the same section
Body text must NOT use --font-display-anton (Anton has no readable italic; use Poppins for body)
